text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day during the holiday season, I'm having a
meeting with Silence Suzuka when she notices the
snow falling outside.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Gasp! It's snowing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, it reminds me of home. It snows a lot there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And... I love the way it absorbs sound.
choice_data_list: Do you want to go outside?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Just like I thought, the air is so fresh. Ahh,
it feels like home.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Running in the snow feels so good.
choice_data_list: Did you do it a lot?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You know, snow is actually the reason I grew
to love running so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I ask her to tell me more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When I was a child, I was enchanted by the
tranquility of this snowfield and decided to try
running through it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, all I could hear was the sound of my
own heartbeat. It was so quiet, and all I could see
was white. I was suddenly struck by the beauty of
it all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I felt like I had the whole world all to myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think it was then that I became so taken with
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every Umamusume has their own reason for
running, but Silence Suzuka's feels particularly
unique.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her desire to take in that scenery is genuine.
choice_data_list:
Let's seize that world together, and keep it for
as long as you want.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "Together..."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yes, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to take a walk in the snow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her staring out into the snow, I ask her
what's on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All this snow... It's perfect for the holidays, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to consider something after hearing my
answer. Suddenly, she strides out into the snow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well, 'tis the season.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She crouches down and begins sculpting a little
bunny out of snow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I used to make these every now and then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing special, but... please think of it as my
present to you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This special day with Silence Suzuka has turned
out to be one I'll remember for a long time to
come.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking that stump over there looks
like a log cake.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's that time of year again, isn't it? I haven't
thought about it until now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Why don't we have some cake to celebrate?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If you like, maybe we could make a log cake
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make a trip to the store to buy the
ingredients for our cake, and bring everything
back to my office.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Does the frosting look like wood to you?
choice_data_list: Yeah, you're really good at that!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's way too many strawberries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This special day with Silence Suzuka has turned
out to be one I'll remember for a long time to
come.
